data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1. Scanned-agent import flow is broken: [src/components/settings-agents-section.tsx] stops wiring any add callback into the scan-results UI (reviewed commit c264551c9e0e, lines 46-71), while [src/components/settings-agents-scanned.tsx] renders only dismiss and multi-select controls with no add action (lines 80-122, 147-245). The remaining add logic in [src/components/settings-agents-hooks.tsx] is now unreachable dead code (lines 134-210). This violates the knot intent to streamline scanned-agent rows, not remove the ability to add scanned agents. Sanity gates on an isolated snapshot of c264551c9e0e: tsc passed, unit tests passed, lint exited 0 with one unrelated existing warning.
